summary: Doctor-oriented UI project with premium styling. User is refining the UI with consistent advanced footer, Roboto font for headings, hero theme settings in admin, and advanced particle effect selection.
architectural_notes: UI is doctor-oriented with premium styling using Roboto as the heading font

existing_features.title: Redesign the Footer component to be advanced, structured, and visually consistent with the rest of the UI (warm neutral tones, teal accents, card-based aesthetic). The footer should include multiple columns: a branding/bio column, a quick navigation links column, a contact/clinic info column, and a social media links column. Add a bottom bar with copyright text and a divider. Match typography, color tokens, and spacing conventions used in Header and section components.

Import the Roboto font from Google Fonts (in index.html and/or index.css) and apply it as the primary font for all headings (h1–h6) and section titles across the entire application, including the Header, Hero section, About, Services, Clinics, SocialMedia pages, and Footer. Update the Tailwind config fontFamily to reference Roboto for the heading/display font stack.

Expand the HeroSettingsEditor admin component into a powerful, comprehensive hero theme settings panel. It should include: gradient start and end color pickers, overlay opacity slider, text color selector, background blur toggle, glassmorphism intensity slider, hero height selector (options: compact/normal/full-screen), animation speed control, enable/disable mouse parallax toggle, and a live preview thumbnail of the combined settings. Persist all new fields via the updateHeroSettings backend mutation and ensure the Home/Hero page reads and applies all settings.

Implement an advanced particle effect selection system in the HeroSettingsEditor admin panel. Provide a gallery/grid of named particle presets the admin can choose from, including at minimum: None, Floating Dots, Stars, Snow, Bubbles, Geometric Shapes, DNA Helix, Medical Pulse, Confetti, and Fireflies. Each preset should display a small animated preview thumbnail. Additionally, expose fine-tuning controls for the selected preset: particle count slider, particle size range, particle speed slider, particle color picker, and particle opacity slider. Implement the actual particle animations in the ParticleCanvas component on the hero section using canvas-based or CSS animation rendering.

new_feature_requests.summary: Make footer consistent with the rest of the UI, advanced and structured
Use Roboto font for all headings across the UI
Add powerful hero theme settings in the admin section
Add advanced particle effect selection abilities
